bot.greeting: Welcome to Dikho 🙏 We'll build your FREE Google website in 10 minutes. Shall we start? (Yes / No)
bot.ask_vertical: What type of business do you run?
bot.ask_address: What's your business address? (Share your location or type it)
bot.ask_photos: Please send 3 photos: 1 storefront, 1 inside, 1 work sample
bot.ask_language: What language should your website be in? (Hindi / English / Hinglish)
bot.complete: Your website is live! 🎉 {url} — Share it with your customers!
bot.resume: Welcome back! Continue where we left off?
bot.stop_confirm: Understood. We'll pause here. Say 'hello' anytime to continue.
bot.invalid_input: Sorry, I didn't get that. Let's try again.
bot.invalid_photo: Please send an image (JPG/PNG). Try again.
bot.waitlist: You're on the waitlist for {vertical}! We'll notify you when it's available.
bot.faq_not_found: I'm not sure about that. Let me get back to our setup!

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid 10-digit Indian mobile number.
